content: Hey, are you going to Hamilton Library later?
Did you finish the ECE 367 Lab?
Yeah, I'll be there at 2pm.
Almost! Just debugging the chat map.
Sweet. Are we meeting on the first floor or the Sunny Side?
Let's do Sunny Side. More outlets for our laptops.
Good call. My battery is already at 20%.
I'm bringing a power strip just in case.
Life saver! By the way, did you get the BST logic to work?
Mostly, but my printInOrder function is skipping the root.
Check your null pointer checks. I had the same issue.
I'll look at it when I get to the library.
Just parked. Heading up to the 3rd floor now.
I just grabbed a coffee from the Bean, be there in 5.
Can you grab me a cold brew? I'll Venmo you.
Sure thing. Cream or sugar?
Just black is fine, thanks!
Got it. Standing in line now, it's pretty busy.
No rush. I found a table near the window.
Awesome, see you in a bit.
